ai.title: Prompt the portfolio assistant with code or screenshots
ai.description: Ask for implementation help, debugging suggestions, or code generated from UI screenshots. This turns the existing AI tooling into a real product surface.
ai.textModeDescription: Ask for code generation, refactors, or debugging help directly from a typed prompt.
ai.imageModeDescription: Upload a screenshot and ask the assistant to generate tests, code ideas, or implementation notes from the visual input.
ai.textPromptPlaceholder: Describe the feature, bug, or implementation you want help with...
ai.imagePromptPlaceholder: Explain what the screenshot shows and what you want the assistant to generate...
ai.imageHelp: Use a UI screenshot, design fragment, or bug capture.
ai.textHint: Text mode uses the assistant directly.
ai.imageHint: Image mode combines your screenshot with the prompt.
ai.empty: Your generated answer will appear here. Start with a concrete request for the best result.
ai.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while contacting the assistant.
